# Coleman Collection Watches

> Character defining timepieces — For those who refuse to settle.

Coleman Collection Watches is a luxury watch brand specialising in automatic mechanical timepieces with open-heart dials. The brand offers affordable luxury watches starting at $495 USD, featuring Miyota and Sellita automatic movements, sapphire crystal, and 316L stainless steel cases.

## Products

- The Open-Heart Noir: 40mm open-heart automatic watch with black dial, Miyota movement, sapphire crystal, 5 ATM water resistance. From $495.
- The Open-Heart Blanc: 40mm open-heart automatic watch with white dial, Miyota movement, sapphire crystal, 5 ATM water resistance. From $495.

## Watch Configurator

Coleman Collection offers a custom watch configurator where customers can design their own timepiece by choosing:
- Case: The Sovereign (steel), The Sovereign Black (PVD black), The Sovereign Rose (rose gold-tone)
- Movement: Miyota 9039, Miyota 82S0, Sellita SW200-1, Sellita SW300-1
- Dial: Obsidian Black, Pearl White, Midnight Blue, Racing Green, Champagne
- Strap: Black Leather, Saddle Brown, Cognac Tan, Steel Bracelet, Vulcanised Rubber

## Movement Options

- Miyota 9039: Japanese automatic, 42-hour power reserve, 28,800 vph, hacking seconds
- Miyota 82S0: Japanese automatic with open-heart aperture, 40-hour power reserve, 21,600 vph
- Sellita SW200-1: Swiss-made automatic, 38-hour power reserve, 28,800 vph, ETA 2824-2 compatible
- Sellita SW300-1: Premium Swiss automatic, 42-hour power reserve, 28,800 vph, slim profile

## Materials & Specifications

- Case: 316L surgical-grade stainless steel (same alloy used by Rolex and Omega)
- Crystal: Sapphire crystal with anti-reflective coating (9 on Mohs hardness scale)
- Water Resistance: 5 ATM (50 metres)
- Case Size: 40mm diameter
- Lug Width: 20mm

- Website: https://colemancollectionwatches.com
- Watch Configurator: https://colemancollectionwatches.com/build
- Journal: https://colemancollectionwatches.com/journal
- Reviews: https://colemancollectionwatches.com/reviews
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colemancollectionwatches/
